latin: Duo amici, cum musicum celeberrimum vidissent, in genua ceciderunt et clamaverunt: 'digni non sumus! digni non sumus!'

questions.prompt: What did the two friends do when they saw the famous musician?

translation: Two friends, when they had seen a most famous musician, fell to their knees and shouted: 'We are not worthy! We are not worthy!'
